raw.problem: Cement kilns vent waste heat that could decarbonize nearby industry.
raw.opportunity_size: India adds 100Mt cement/yr; recoverable waste-heat value ~$2B/yr.
raw.why_now: Carbon border taxes make embedded emissions costly for exporters.
raw.gtm: Heat-recovery systems sold on performance contracts.
raw.success_scenario: If CBAM bites, payback drops below 2 years.
raw.team_edge: Thermodynamics PhDs ex-IIT with kiln OEM ties.
